title: All the Items
description: Finally, a mod that tracks every item in the game and tells you whether you already own it or not.
body:
Hello everyone,
This mod tracks the receipt of all items.
I've been looking for a mod like this for a long time and was getting desperate.
So I built a mod myself.
All the Items is currently still in beta, but it already works very well.

You can open the dashboard with “G.”
It tracks based on world name or server IP.

I had a lot of fun building it and will continue to develop this mod.

Have fun :)

Shaqu
